name: Stewed Alligator in Creole Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Peeled; seeded, chopped tomatoes (preferably ripe plum tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the olive oil.
2. When the oil is hot, sauté the onions, celery, and peppers for 1 minute.
3. Add the garlic and continue sautéing for 1 minute.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, basil, oregano, and thyme.
5. Season with salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper to taste.
6. Add the Worcestershire sauce and chicken stock.
7. Bring the liquid up to a boil.
8. Add the green onions and alligator, cover.
9. Simmer the mixture for 12 minutes.
10. Remove from heat and stir in butter.
11. Spoon the stew into a shallow bowl.
12. Garnish with parsley.
13. Serve with crusty bread. This recipe yields 4 appetizer servings.
